name: Vegetable Chili
snippet: As you can probably tell, I am all about hearty soups during the fall and this vegetable chili is no exception.  It is so hearty that you won’t even miss the meat!  That is why it fits in so well with our Meatless Monday meals (although I wouldn’t mind having this any day of the week). This is also one of those dishes that tastes better the longer the flavors mingle so leftovers will be extra delicious.  You can make it as spicy or mild as you like by adjusting the cayenne and including some or all of the jalapeno seeds.  Go ahead make a big batch, freeze it and pull it out on those days when you don’t feel like cooking, you’ll be glad you did!
